task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Dear Priya,

We are thrilled to officially welcome you and the Meridian Group IT team to the Project Helios integration environment.

Project Helios, NovaBridge's premier data integration platform, is designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and securely deliver clean data to your reporting platform via APIs and webhooks. Knowing Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a seamless path to UAT, we are confident that Helios will equip your team with the visibility, control, and high performance you need from day one.

To get started, we will send your secure access credentials and onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, please note the following next steps and key milestones:

1. Integration Setup: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (target by 2026-07-12).
2. UAT Provisioning: Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. Stakeholder Demo: We will aim to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For any technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, and general inquiries, you can contact me directly at s.chen@novabridge.com. Both Derek and I are here to ensure this is a smooth transition for your team.

Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions. We are greatly looking forward to a successful partnership with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have reviewed and improved the draft email to Priya Kapoor. It is now more personalized, professional, and warmly welcomes the Meridian Group's IT team while clearly laying out the technical steps and key contacts.

I've saved the revised version back to the `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt` file in your working directory, as requested, without sending it. Let me know if you need any further adjustments!
